TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Saisiyat, story: SaiNr-frog3_'oemaw_a_basi'
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: hin hini' 'aehae' korkoring 'aehae' nisia taew'an hayza' ho hayza' ka takem hayza' ka 'aehoe' spanan nisia.
S.PHON: hin hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ ʔæhæʔ nis~θia tæwʔan hajz~ðaʔ ho hajz~ðaʔ ka takəm hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔæhœʔ s~θpanan nis~θia.
S.FORM: hin hini' 'aehae' korkoring 'aehae' nisia taew'an hayza' ho hayza' ka takem hayza' ka 'aehoe' spanan nisia.
S.PHON: hin hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ ʔæhæʔ nis~θia tæwʔan hajz~ðaʔ ho hajz~ðaʔ ka takəm hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔæhœʔ s~θpanan nis~θia.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩,有青蛙,在家養了一隻狗.
A child had a frog and raised a dog at home.

S.FORM: nisia rengreng ma 'araSen ray halapaw ma'rem ki lasia.
S.PHON: nis~θia rəŋrəŋ ma ʔaraʃən raj halapaw maʔrəm ki las~θia.
S.FORM: nisia rengreng ma 'araSen ray halapaw ma'rem ki lasia.
S.PHON: nis~θia rəŋrəŋ ma ʔaraʃən raj halapaw maʔrəm ki las~θia.
S.TRANSL: 他總是帶他們到床上當他們睡覺時.

TRANSL.notes: He always took them to bed (when) they slept.

S.TRANSL: He always took them to bed they slept.

S.FORM: hini' haewan ila o hoN.
S.PHON: hiniʔ hæwan ila o hon.
S.FORM: hini' haewan ila o hoN.
S.PHON: hiniʔ hæwan ila o hon.
S.TRANSL: It was late in the evening.

S.FORM: o ila hini ka korkoring ma'rem ila.
S.PHON: o ila hini ka korkoriŋ maʔrəm ila.
S.FORM: o ila hini ka korkoring ma'rem ila.
S.PHON: o ila hini ka korkoriŋ maʔrəm ila.
S.TRANSL: The child came here to sleep.

S.FORM: o nisia 'ahoe' ma'ma'rem nisia halapaw ki sia.
S.PHON: o nis~θia ʔahœʔ maʔmaʔrəm nis~θia halapaw ki s~θia.
S.FORM: o nisia 'ahoe' ma'ma'rem nisia halapaw ki sia.
S.PHON: o nis~θia ʔahœʔ maʔmaʔrəm nis~θia halapaw ki s~θia.
S.TRANSL: His dog slept with him on his bed.

S.FORM: a nisia takem 'askan ray taboway nisia kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: a nis~θia takəm ʔas~θkan raj taβowaj nis~θia kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.FORM: a nisia takem 'askan ray taboway nisia kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: a nis~θia takəm ʔas~θkan raj taβowaj nis~θia kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.TRANSL: 他放在罐子裡的青蛙出來了.
The frog he put inside the container came out.

S.FORM: ia ma 'okik raami kik 'ae'aeih.
S.PHON: ia ma ʔokik raami kik ʔæʔæih.
S.FORM: ia ma 'okik raami kik 'ae'aeih.
S.PHON: ia ma ʔokik raami kik ʔæʔæih.
S.TRANSL: When he was not aware of it.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' sik sikselra ila hayza' ho.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ s~θik s~θiks~θəlra ila hajz~ðaʔ ho.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' sik sikselra ila hayza' ho.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ s~θik s~θiks~θəlra ila hajz~ðaʔ ho.

TRANSL.notes: (When he woke up,) it was sunrise.

S.FORM: min'itol o kita' ka i taboway.
S.PHON: minʔitol o kitaʔ ka i taβowaj.
S.FORM: min'itol o kita' ka i taboway.
S.PHON: minʔitol o kitaʔ ka i taβowaj.
S.TRANSL: He got up and looked at the jar.

S.FORM: nisia takem 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: nis~θia takəm ʔokaʔ ila.
S.FORM: nisia takem 'oka' ila.
S.PHON: nis~θia takəm ʔokaʔ ila.

S.FORM: ki 'aehoe' ma'rem ma' m'itol ila lasia.
S.PHON: ki ʔæhœʔ maʔrəm maʔ mʔitol ila las~θia.
S.FORM: ki 'aehoe' ma'rem ma' m'itol ila lasia.
S.PHON: ki ʔæhœʔ maʔrəm maʔ mʔitol ila las~θia.
S.TRANSL: 跟他一起睡的狗也起來了.

TRANSL.notes: The dog that slept (with him) got up too.

S.TRANSL: The dog that slept got up too.

S.FORM: kiim ila ka ray taboway ka takem.
S.PHON: kiim ila ka raj taβowaj ka takəm.
S.FORM: kiim ila ka ray taboway ka takem.
S.PHON: kiim ila ka raj taβowaj ka takəm.

TRANSL.notes: (They) looked for the frog in the jar.

S.TRANSL: looked for the frog in the jar.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma rima' sazek ray ray taboway 'izo' kiim ka takem.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ma rimaʔ s~θaz~ðək raj raj taβowaj ʔiz~ðoʔ kiim ka takəm.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma rima' sazek ray ray taboway 'izo' kiim ka takem.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ma rimaʔ s~θaz~ðək raj raj taβowaj ʔiz~ðoʔ kiim ka takəm.
S.TRANSL: 狗去聞罐子裡的味道,要去找青蛙.
The dog went to smell the inside of the jar to look for the frog.

S.FORM: hini' korkoring ray haehoeway hey ray haehoeway 'izo' nisia kiim ka t takem 'oka' tihoeroei.
S.PHON: hiniʔ korkoriŋ raj hæhœwaj həj raj hæhœwaj ʔiz~ðoʔ nis~θia kiim ka t takəm ʔokaʔ tihœrœi.
S.FORM: hini' korkoring ray haehoeway hey ray haehoeway 'izo' nisia kiim ka t takem 'oka' tihoeroei.
S.PHON: hiniʔ korkoriŋ raj hæhœwaj həj raj hæhœwaj ʔiz~ðoʔ nis~θia kiim ka t takəm ʔokaʔ tihœrœi.
S.TRANSL: 小孩在他的鞋子裡找青蛙,可是沒找到.
The child looked for the frog inside his shoes but did not find it.

S.FORM: haewaeh ila ka hinoehas.
S.PHON: hæwæh ila ka hinœhas~θ.
S.FORM: haewaeh ila ka hinoehas.
S.PHON: hæwæh ila ka hinœhas~θ.

S.FORM: a rima' ila kiim ka.
S.PHON: a rimaʔ ila kiim ka.
S.FORM: a rima' ila kiim ka.
S.PHON: a rimaʔ ila kiim ka.

S.FORM: 'oe'oe ila ka takem.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm.
S.FORM: 'oe'oe ila ka takem.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm.

S.FORM: rima' ray hinoehas kababaw.
S.PHON: rimaʔ raj hinœhas~θ kaβaβaw.
S.FORM: rima' ray hinoehas kababaw.
S.PHON: rimaʔ raj hinœhas~θ kaβaβaw.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma 'ima 'ima pantapo' ka hini' taboway sia hini'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ma ʔima ʔima pantapoʔ ka hiniʔ taβowaj s~θia hiniʔ.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma 'ima 'ima pantapo' ka hini' taboway sia hini'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ma ʔima ʔima pantapoʔ ka hiniʔ taβowaj s~θia hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: This dog stuck in the jar.

S.FORM: kita' hini' sia hini' ray ray XXXX ray hini' ray ka hinoehas kita' hini' 'aehoe' sahae' ila 'ima ki taboway.
S.PHON: kitaʔ hiniʔ s~θia hiniʔ raj raj **** raj hiniʔ raj ka hinœhas~θ kitaʔ hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ ila ʔima ki taβowaj.
S.FORM: kita' hini' sia hini' ray ray XXXX ray hini' ray ka hinoehas kita' hini' 'aehoe' sahae' ila 'ima ki taboway.
S.PHON: kitaʔ hiniʔ s~θia hiniʔ raj raj **** raj hiniʔ raj ka hinœhas~θ kitaʔ hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ s~θahæʔ ila ʔima ki taβowaj.

TRANSL.notes: 在窗戶旁的(小孩)看到狗跟罐子掉下去了.

S.TRANSL: 在窗戶旁的 看到狗跟罐子掉下去了.
The child by the window saw the dog fell with the jar.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' tas sahae' ray ray rai' kita'en hini' ka.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ tas~θ s~θahæʔ raj raj raiʔ kitaʔən hiniʔ ka.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' tas sahae' ray ray rai' kita'en hini' ka.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ tas~θ s~θahæʔ raj raj raiʔ kitaʔən hiniʔ ka.

S.FORM: taboway minlakay ila.
S.PHON: taβowaj minlakaj ila.
S.FORM: taboway minlakay ila.
S.PHON: taβowaj minlakaj ila.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma nisia 'aehoe' noka korkoring ma 'aewpoe'oen ila.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ma nis~θia ʔæhœʔ noka korkoriŋ ma ʔæwpœʔœn ila.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' ma nisia 'aehoe' noka korkoring ma 'aewpoe'oen ila.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ma nis~θia ʔæhœʔ noka korkoriŋ ma ʔæwpœʔœn ila.

S.FORM: lasia ziyae' ila ka nisia kinmae'iyaehan.
S.PHON: las~θia z~ðijæʔ ila ka nis~θia kinmæʔijæhan.
S.FORM: lasia ziyae' ila ka nisia kinmae'iyaehan.
S.PHON: las~θia z~ðijæʔ ila ka nis~θia kinmæʔijæhan.

S.FORM: isaa lasia rima' ila ray latar kiim ka ka hiza' takem.
S.PHON: is~θaa las~θia rimaʔ ila raj latar kiim ka ka hiz~ðaʔ takəm.
S.FORM: isaa lasia rima' ila ray latar kiim ka ka hiza' takem.
S.PHON: is~θaa las~θia rimaʔ ila raj latar kiim ka ka hiz~ðaʔ takəm.
S.TRANSL: 他們就去外面找那個青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (Then) they went out to look for the frog.

S.TRANSL: they went out to look for the frog.

S.FORM: kita' hini' rima' ray o ray 'oeS'oeSoe'an kita'en hini' kita'en ka boya' hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔ hiniʔ rimaʔ raj o raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan kitaʔən hiniʔ kitaʔən ka βojaʔ hiniʔ.
S.FORM: kita' hini' rima' ray o ray 'oeS'oeSoe'an kita'en hini' kita'en ka boya' hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔ hiniʔ rimaʔ raj o raj ʔœʃʔœʃœʔan kitaʔən hiniʔ kitaʔən ka βojaʔ hiniʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (They) went to the mountain and saw this beehive.

S.TRANSL: went to the mountain and saw this beehive.

S.FORM: kita'en ka kaw 'ima hayza' ka ka 'ima hayza' ka 'ima hayza' ka ka 'ima hayza' ka kano' ila hini' ka koSa ka koSa ka kano' ila hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən ka kaw ʔima hajz~ðaʔ ka ka ʔima hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔima hajz~ðaʔ ka ka ʔima hajz~ðaʔ ka kanoʔ ila hiniʔ ka koʃa ka koʃa ka kanoʔ ila hiniʔ.
S.FORM: kita'en ka kaw 'ima hayza' ka ka 'ima hayza' ka 'ima hayza' ka ka 'ima hayza' ka kano' ila hini' ka koSa ka koSa ka kano' ila hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən ka kaw ʔima hajz~ðaʔ ka ka ʔima hajz~ðaʔ ka ʔima hajz~ðaʔ ka ka ʔima hajz~ðaʔ ka kanoʔ ila hiniʔ ka koʃa ka koʃa ka kanoʔ ila hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: They did not know what that was.

S.FORM: hayza' o ma ka kasiralan sa noka kabkabahae hini' ka hiza' ka.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ o ma ka kas~θiralan s~θa noka kaβkaβahæ hiniʔ ka hiz~ðaʔ ka.
S.FORM: hayza' o ma ka kasiralan sa noka kabkabahae hini' ka hiza' ka.
S.PHON: hajz~ðaʔ o ma ka kas~θiralan s~θa noka kaβkaβahæ hiniʔ ka hiz~ðaʔ ka.

S.FORM: kasiralan kasi kita'en haengih ila hini' 'oewi' 'am rima' ila tongtongay ka ka boya' kita'en hini' haw rima' tongay ila.
S.PHON: kas~θiralan kas~θi kitaʔən hæŋih ila hiniʔ ʔœwiʔ ʔam rimaʔ ila toŋtoŋaj ka ka βojaʔ kitaʔən hiniʔ haw rimaʔ toŋaj ila.
S.FORM: kasiralan kasi kita'en haengih ila hini' 'oewi' 'am rima' ila tongtongay ka ka boya' kita'en hini' haw rima' tongay ila.
S.PHON: kas~θiralan kas~θi kitaʔən hæŋih ila hiniʔ ʔœwiʔ ʔam rimaʔ ila toŋtoŋaj ka ka βojaʔ kitaʔən hiniʔ haw rimaʔ toŋaj ila.
S.TRANSL: This bird went to play at the beehive.

S.FORM: rima' haehrih ila ka boway hini' e haehrih ila ka kaehoey.
S.PHON: rimaʔ hæhrih ila ka βowaj hiniʔ ə hæhrih ila ka kæhœj.
S.FORM: rima' haehrih ila ka boway hini' e haehrih ila ka kaehoey.
S.PHON: rimaʔ hæhrih ila ka βowaj hiniʔ ə hæhrih ila ka kæhœj.

S.FORM: hini' boya' ma kas'oe kas'oehaez ila saboeh.
S.PHON: hiniʔ βojaʔ ma kas~θʔœ kas~θʔœhæz~ð ila s~θaβœh.
S.FORM: hini' boya' ma kas'oe kas'oehaez ila saboeh.
S.PHON: hiniʔ βojaʔ ma kas~θʔœ kas~θʔœhæz~ð ila s~θaβœh.
S.TRANSL: 全部的蜂都 出來了.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehae' korkoring kita'en hini' ray rapoe tihoeroe a ka.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ kitaʔən hiniʔ raj rapœ tihœrœ a ka.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehae' korkoring kita'en hini' ray rapoe tihoeroe a ka.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ korkoriŋ kitaʔən hiniʔ raj rapœ tihœrœ a ka.
S.TRANSL: The child saw on the ground and found ...

S.FORM: ka hini' ka so noka noka kalnahap XXXX a roSa' ka hini' ka katesnenan nisia.
S.PHON: ka hiniʔ ka s~θo noka noka kalnahap **** a roʃaʔ ka hiniʔ ka katəs~θnənan nis~θia.
S.FORM: ka hini' ka so noka noka kalnahap XXXX a roSa' ka hini' ka katesnenan nisia.
S.PHON: ka hiniʔ ka s~θo noka noka kalnahap **** a roʃaʔ ka hiniʔ ka katəs~θnənan nis~θia.

S.FORM: sia 'oe'oe ila ka takem.
S.PHON: s~θia ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm.
S.FORM: sia 'oe'oe ila ka takem.
S.PHON: s~θia ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka kas'oehaz takem.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ka kas~θʔœhaz~ð takəm.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka kas'oehaz takem.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ka kas~θʔœhaz~ð takəm.
S.TRANSL: 他看到這個出來,不是青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (He) saw this (something) came out. (It) was not the frog.

S.TRANSL: saw this came out. was not the frog.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka 'a'aros ka kaehoey ila hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ka ʔaʔaros~θ ka kæhœj ila hiniʔ.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' ka 'a'aros ka kaehoey ila hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ka ʔaʔaros~θ ka kæhœj ila hiniʔ.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' rima' ila haehrih ila ka kaehoey ka boya' hao hoN.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ ila hæhrih ila ka kæhœj ka βojaʔ hao hon.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' rima' ila haehrih ila ka kaehoey ka boya' hao hoN.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ rimaʔ ila hæhrih ila ka kæhœj ka βojaʔ hao hon.
S.TRANSL: 這個狗去搖樹...那裡的蜂窩.
The dog went to shake the tree...the beehive there.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' boya' hini' sahae' ila ray ray rapoe' hini' kita'en.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ βojaʔ hiniʔ s~θahæʔ ila raj raj rapœʔ hiniʔ kitaʔən.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' boya' hini' sahae' ila ray ray rapoe' hini' kita'en.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ βojaʔ hiniʔ s~θahæʔ ila raj raj rapœʔ hiniʔ kitaʔən.
S.TRANSL: The hive fell on the ground.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehae' noka 'aehoe' paksahae'en ila.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ noka ʔæhœʔ paks~θahæʔən ila.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehae' noka 'aehoe' paksahae'en ila.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhæʔ noka ʔæhœʔ paks~θahæʔən ila.
S.TRANSL: 這個蜂窩因為狗掉下來.

TRANSL.notes: This (hive) fell down (because of) the dog.

S.FORM: hini' 'a'aros ma kita' ila ray ray ray isaza.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔaʔaros~θ ma kitaʔ ila raj raj raj is~θaz~ða.
S.FORM: hini' 'a'aros ma kita' ila ray ray ray isaza.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔaʔaros~θ ma kitaʔ ila raj raj raj is~θaz~ða.

S.FORM: hini' korkoring kaSna'itol ray ray kaehoey babaw hiza' rima' 'oe'oe ray hao 'izo' ka kalhib 'izo' ka.
S.PHON: hiniʔ korkoriŋ kaʃnaʔitol raj raj kæhœj βaβaw hiz~ðaʔ rimaʔ ʔœʔœ raj hao ʔiz~ðoʔ ka kalhiβ ʔiz~ðoʔ ka.
S.FORM: hini' korkoring kaSna'itol ray ray kaehoey babaw hiza' rima' 'oe'oe ray hao 'izo' ka kalhib 'izo' ka.
S.PHON: hiniʔ korkoriŋ kaʃnaʔitol raj raj kæhœj βaβaw hiz~ðaʔ rimaʔ ʔœʔœ raj hao ʔiz~ðoʔ ka kalhiβ ʔiz~ðoʔ ka.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上樹,往洞裡面叫.
The child climbed up the tree and called inside the hole.

S.FORM: ray kaehoey 'izo' ma 'oe'oe ila ka takem a raroo'.
S.PHON: raj kæhœj ʔiz~ðoʔ ma ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm a rarooʔ.
S.FORM: ray kaehoey 'izo' ma 'oe'oe ila ka takem a raroo'.
S.PHON: raj kæhœj ʔiz~ðoʔ ma ʔœʔœ ila ka takəm a rarooʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (He) called the frog's name toward the inside of the tree.

S.TRANSL: called the frog's name toward the inside of the tree.

S.FORM: 'oe'oe kita' hini' ka takem kas'oehaz kita'en hini' ka kal'oe kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ kitaʔ hiniʔ ka takəm kas~θʔœhaz~ð kitaʔən hiniʔ ka kalʔœ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.
S.FORM: 'oe'oe kita' hini' ka takem kas'oehaz kita'en hini' ka kal'oe kas'oehaz ila.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ kitaʔ hiniʔ ka takəm kas~θʔœhaz~ð kitaʔən hiniʔ ka kalʔœ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila.

TRANSL.notes: (他)叫了,可是不是青蛙跑出來,(他)看到貓頭鷹出來.

S.TRANSL: 叫了,可是不是青蛙跑出來, 看到貓頭鷹出來.

TRANSL.notes: (He) called but it was not a frog that came out. (He) saw an owl come out.

S.TRANSL: called but it was not a frog that came out. saw an owl come out.

S.FORM: kal'oe kas'oehaz ila homses.
S.PHON: kalʔœ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila homs~θəs~θ.
S.FORM: kal'oe kas'oehaz ila homses.
S.PHON: kalʔœ kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila homs~θəs~θ.

TRANSL.notes: 貓頭鷹跑出來,(他)嚇到了.

S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹跑出來, 嚇到了.

TRANSL.notes: The owl came out. (The boy) got frightened.

S.TRANSL: The owl came out. got frightened.

S.FORM: sahae' ray ray kaehoey babaw sahae' ila ray rapoe hini'.
S.PHON: s~θahæʔ raj raj kæhœj βaβaw s~θahæʔ ila raj rapœ hiniʔ.
S.FORM: sahae' ray ray kaehoey babaw sahae' ila ray rapoe hini'.
S.PHON: s~θahæʔ raj raj kæhœj βaβaw s~θahæʔ ila raj rapœ hiniʔ.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy) fell on the ground from up the tree.

S.TRANSL: fell on the ground from up the tree.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' 'oka' ila nanaw hini' 'ima sahae' ray.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ʔokaʔ ila nanaw hiniʔ ʔima s~θahæʔ raj.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' 'oka' ila nanaw hini' 'ima sahae' ray.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ ʔokaʔ ila nanaw hiniʔ ʔima s~θahæʔ raj.
S.TRANSL: It seems that there is nothing that can be done.

S.FORM: ka boya' hini' sowaw ila ka hiza' 'aehoe' hiza' 'aehoe' 'aheoe' sowawen noka hiza' boya'.
S.PHON: ka βojaʔ hiniʔ s~θowaw ila ka hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ ʔahəœʔ s~θowawən noka hiz~ðaʔ βojaʔ.
S.FORM: ka boya' hini' sowaw ila ka hiza' 'aehoe' hiza' 'aehoe' 'aheoe' sowawen noka hiza' boya'.
S.PHON: ka βojaʔ hiniʔ s~θowaw ila ka hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ hiz~ðaʔ ʔæhœʔ ʔahəœʔ s~θowawən noka hiz~ðaʔ βojaʔ.

TRANSL.notes: 蜂窩掉下來,(蜂)追那個狗.

S.TRANSL: 蜂窩掉下來, 追那個狗.

TRANSL.notes: The beehive that fell down, (the bees) chased the dog.

S.TRANSL: The beehive that fell down, chased the dog.

S.FORM: kita'en lasia hini' hini' e korkoring noka kal'oe sowawen hini' sia hosail ila ray bato' babaw.
S.PHON: kitaʔən las~θia hiniʔ hiniʔ ə korkoriŋ noka kalʔœ s~θowawən hiniʔ s~θia hos~θail ila raj βatoʔ βaβaw.
S.FORM: kita'en lasia hini' hini' e korkoring noka kal'oe sowawen hini' sia hosail ila ray bato' babaw.
S.PHON: kitaʔən las~θia hiniʔ hiniʔ ə korkoriŋ noka kalʔœ s~θowawən hiniʔ s~θia hos~θail ila raj βatoʔ βaβaw.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹追那個小孩,小孩藏在石頭上.

TRANSL.notes: The owl chased the child and (the child) hid on top of the rock.

S.TRANSL: The owl chased the child and hid on top of the rock.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' bi 'ima bilis ka panga'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ βi ʔima βilis~θ ka paŋaʔ.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' bi 'ima bilis ka panga'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ βi ʔima βilis~θ ka paŋaʔ.
S.TRANSL: The child was holding a branch.

S.FORM: panga' nisia raraeten hini'.
S.PHON: paŋaʔ nis~θia rarætən hiniʔ.
S.FORM: panga' nisia raraeten hini'.
S.PHON: paŋaʔ nis~θia rarætən hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: He grabbed on to some branch.

S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' isaa ray ray bato' 'ima hosail ka hiza' boya'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ is~θaa raj raj βatoʔ ʔima hos~θail ka hiz~ðaʔ βojaʔ.
S.FORM: hini' 'aehoe' isaa ray ray bato' 'ima hosail ka hiza' boya'.
S.PHON: hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ is~θaa raj raj βatoʔ ʔima hos~θail ka hiz~ðaʔ βojaʔ.
S.TRANSL: The dog on the rock was hiding from the bee.

S.FORM: sia 'ima raraet ka ka hiza' komoSa' kaehoey hini' panga' kano' nisia hini' raraeten hayza' ho.
S.PHON: s~θia ʔima raræt ka ka hiz~ðaʔ komoʃaʔ kæhœj hiniʔ paŋaʔ kanoʔ nis~θia hiniʔ rarætən hajz~ðaʔ ho.
S.FORM: sia 'ima raraet ka ka hiza' komoSa' kaehoey hini' panga' kano' nisia hini' raraeten hayza' ho.
S.PHON: s~θia ʔima raræt ka ka hiz~ðaʔ komoʃaʔ kæhœj hiniʔ paŋaʔ kanoʔ nis~θia hiniʔ rarætən hajz~ðaʔ ho.
S.TRANSL: What is that branch that he was grabbing on to?

S.FORM: 'oe'oe ila nokatakema raroo' isaa ka.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ila nokatakəma rarooʔ is~θaa ka.
S.FORM: 'oe'oe ila nokatakema raroo' isaa ka.
S.PHON: ʔœʔœ ila nokatakəma rarooʔ is~θaa ka.

S.FORM: wae'ae' min'itol ila min'itol ila hini'.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ minʔitol ila minʔitol ila hiniʔ.
S.FORM: wae'ae' min'itol ila min'itol ila hini'.
S.PHON: wæʔæʔ minʔitol ila minʔitol ila hiniʔ.

S.FORM: sia hini' korkoring pakai ila ray ay ay kaeh'oeng babaw.
S.PHON: s~θia hiniʔ korkoriŋ pakai ila raj aj aj kæhʔœŋ βaβaw.
S.FORM: sia hini' korkoring pakai ila ray ay ay kaeh'oeng babaw.
S.PHON: s~θia hiniʔ korkoriŋ pakai ila raj aj aj kæhʔœŋ βaβaw.

TRANSL.notes: The child hung on to the (deer's) antlers.

S.TRANSL: The child hung on to the antlers.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' kita'en ka wae'ae' hini' wae'ae' mambe'e kita'en sia hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ kitaʔən ka wæʔæʔ hiniʔ wæʔæʔ mamβəʔə kitaʔən s~θia hiniʔ.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' kita'en ka wae'ae' hini' wae'ae' mambe'e kita'en sia hini'.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ kitaʔən ka wæʔæʔ hiniʔ wæʔæʔ mamβəʔə kitaʔən s~θia hiniʔ.

S.FORM: si 'araSen hayza' ho sia rima' 'araSen ray ray ray ray 'ataS kita'en hina si.
S.PHON: s~θi ʔaraʃən hajz~ðaʔ ho s~θia rimaʔ ʔaraʃən raj raj raj raj ʔataʃ kitaʔən hina s~θi.
S.FORM: si 'araSen hayza' ho sia rima' 'araSen ray ray ray ray 'ataS kita'en hina si.
S.PHON: s~θi ʔaraʃən hajz~ðaʔ ho s~θia rimaʔ ʔaraʃən raj raj raj raj ʔataʃ kitaʔən hina s~θi.

TRANSL.notes: (The deer) took (the child) to the cliff.

S.FORM: sipaksahae' ila ray hawhahoer ray bala'.
S.PHON: s~θipaks~θahæʔ ila raj hawhahœr raj βalaʔ.
S.FORM: sipaksahae' ila ray hawhahoer ray bala'.
S.PHON: s~θipaks~θahæʔ ila raj hawhahœr raj βalaʔ.
S.TRANSL: 把 丟到下面的河裡.

S.FORM: hini 'aehoe' ma sahae' ila hao ray bala' lasia roSa' hini'.
S.PHON: hini ʔæhœʔ ma s~θahæʔ ila hao raj βalaʔ las~θia roʃaʔ hiniʔ.
S.FORM: hini 'aehoe' ma sahae' ila hao ray bala' lasia roSa' hini'.
S.PHON: hini ʔæhœʔ ma s~θahæʔ ila hao raj βalaʔ las~θia roʃaʔ hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗也掉進河裡.他們兩個.
The dog also fell into the river. Both of them.

S.FORM: noka wae'ae' sowawen ila e si'osa ta lasia hini'.
S.PHON: noka wæʔæʔ s~θowawən ila ə s~θiʔos~θa ta las~θia hiniʔ.
S.FORM: noka wae'ae' sowawen ila e si'osa ta lasia hini'.
S.PHON: noka wæʔæʔ s~θowawən ila ə s~θiʔos~θa ta las~θia hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 鹿追他們,把他們丟到水裡.

TRANSL.notes: The deer chased them, and tossed them (into the water).

S.TRANSL: The deer chased them, and tossed them .

S.FORM: ila hini' ray ralom 'izo' kita'en hini'.
S.PHON: ila hiniʔ raj ralom ʔiz~ðoʔ kitaʔən hiniʔ.
S.FORM: ila hini' ray ralom 'izo' kita'en hini'.
S.PHON: ila hiniʔ raj ralom ʔiz~ðoʔ kitaʔən hiniʔ.

S.FORM: min'itol kita'en hini' ki 'aehoe' hayza' ho.
S.PHON: minʔitol kitaʔən hiniʔ ki ʔæhœʔ hajz~ðaʔ ho.
S.FORM: min'itol kita'en hini' ki 'aehoe' hayza' ho.
S.PHON: minʔitol kitaʔən hiniʔ ki ʔæhœʔ hajz~ðaʔ ho.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) and the dog stood up.

S.FORM: 'aehoe' kita'en hini' ma mamasa'an masaeng ray kahangalan noka korkoring hini'.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ kitaʔən hiniʔ ma mamas~θaʔan mas~θæŋ raj kahaŋalan noka korkoriŋ hiniʔ.
S.FORM: 'aehoe' kita'en hini' ma mamasa'an masaeng ray kahangalan noka korkoring hini'.
S.PHON: ʔæhœʔ kitaʔən hiniʔ ma mamas~θaʔan mas~θæŋ raj kahaŋalan noka korkoriŋ hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: 狗,張大眼睛,坐在小孩的肩膀上.
The dog, wide-eyed, sat on the child's shoulders.

S.FORM: isaa kiim ba lasia baza' ila ka.
S.PHON: is~θaa kiim βa las~θia βaz~ðaʔ ila ka.
S.FORM: isaa kiim ba lasia baza' ila ka.
S.PHON: is~θaa kiim βa las~θia βaz~ðaʔ ila ka.

S.FORM: ray 'aehae' kaehoey 'ima hao 'izo' kita'en hayza ka noka takema ka ka hingas.
S.PHON: raj ʔæhæʔ kæhœj ʔima hao ʔiz~ðoʔ kitaʔən hajz~ða ka noka takəma ka ka hiŋas~θ.
S.FORM: ray 'aehae' kaehoey 'ima hao 'izo' kita'en hayza ka noka takema ka ka hingas.
S.PHON: raj ʔæhæʔ kæhœj ʔima hao ʔiz~ðoʔ kitaʔən hajz~ða ka noka takəma ka ka hiŋas~θ.

TRANSL.notes: They heard the sound of a frog (croaking) from (the other side of) a piece of wood.

S.TRANSL: They heard the sound of a frog from a piece of wood.

S.FORM: lasia hini' ka korkoring sa iyahimi iyahimi iyahimi ho e himi ho iyahimi atomal hayza' ho lasia sa kita' ila hini' ray kaehoey hini' hikor kita'en hini'.
S.PHON: las~θia hiniʔ ka korkoriŋ s~θa ijahimi ijahimi ijahimi ho ə himi ho ijahimi atomal hajz~ðaʔ ho las~θia s~θa kitaʔ ila hiniʔ raj kæhœj hiniʔ hikor kitaʔən hiniʔ.
S.FORM: lasia hini' ka korkoring sa iyahimi iyahimi iyahimi ho e himi ho iyahimi atomal hayza' ho lasia sa kita' ila hini' ray kaehoey hini' hikor kita'en hini'.
S.PHON: las~θia hiniʔ ka korkoriŋ s~θa ijahimi ijahimi ijahimi ho ə himi ho ijahimi atomal hajz~ðaʔ ho las~θia s~θa kitaʔ ila hiniʔ raj kæhœj hiniʔ hikor kitaʔən hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: at the back of the tree.

S.FORM: a komila' a kita' ray kaehoey hikor kita'en 'akoy ka hayza' roSa' takem kita'en hini'.
S.PHON: a komilaʔ a kitaʔ raj kæhœj hikor kitaʔən ʔakoj ka hajz~ðaʔ roʃaʔ takəm kitaʔən hiniʔ.
S.FORM: a komila' a kita' ray kaehoey hikor kita'en 'akoy ka hayza' roSa' takem kita'en hini'.
S.PHON: a komilaʔ a kitaʔ raj kæhœj hikor kitaʔən ʔakoj ka hajz~ðaʔ roʃaʔ takəm kitaʔən hiniʔ.
S.TRANSL: There were two frogs at the back of the tree.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' nisia ka takem o.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ nis~θia ka takəm o.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' nisia ka takem o.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ nis~θia ka takəm o.

S.FORM: kita'en kas'oehaz 'akoy ila hini' ma.
S.PHON: kitaʔən kas~θʔœhaz~ð ʔakoj ila hiniʔ ma.
S.FORM: kita'en kas'oehaz 'akoy ila hini' ma.
S.PHON: kitaʔən kas~θʔœhaz~ð ʔakoj ila hiniʔ ma.

S.FORM: sia kaSna'itol hini' ra ray kaehoey babaw kita'en hini'.
S.PHON: s~θia kaʃnaʔitol hiniʔ ra raj kæhœj βaβaw kitaʔən hiniʔ.
S.FORM: sia kaSna'itol hini' ra ray kaehoey babaw kita'en hini'.
S.PHON: s~θia kaʃnaʔitol hiniʔ ra raj kæhœj βaβaw kitaʔən hiniʔ.

S.FORM: takem 'akoy atomal hini' kita'en 'akoy atomal 'ima kas'oehaz ila hayza ho.
S.PHON: takəm ʔakoj atomal hiniʔ kitaʔən ʔakoj atomal ʔima kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila hajz~ða ho.
S.FORM: takem 'akoy atomal hini' kita'en 'akoy atomal 'ima kas'oehaz ila hayza ho.
S.PHON: takəm ʔakoj atomal hiniʔ kitaʔən ʔakoj atomal ʔima kas~θʔœhaz~ð ila hajz~ða ho.

S.FORM: lasia tihoeroe ka insiya'a takem hao sia komoSa.
S.PHON: las~θia tihœrœ ka ins~θijaʔa takəm hao s~θia komoʃa.
S.FORM: lasia tihoeroe ka insiya'a takem hao sia komoSa.
S.PHON: las~θia tihœrœ ka ins~θijaʔa takəm hao s~θia komoʃa.

S.FORM: o nisia mari'in ila ray hima' komoSa.
S.PHON: o nis~θia mariʔin ila raj himaʔ komoʃa.
S.FORM: o nisia mari'in ila ray hima' komoSa.
S.PHON: o nis~θia mariʔin ila raj himaʔ komoʃa.

TRANSL.notes: He took (the frog) in his hand.

S.FORM: hani lasia ma 'am alibih ila ka 'insiya'a.
S.PHON: hani las~θia ma ʔam aliβih ila ka ʔins~θijaʔa.
S.FORM: hani lasia ma 'am alibih ila ka 'insiya'a.
S.PHON: hani las~θia ma ʔam aliβih ila ka ʔins~θijaʔa.
S.TRANSL: 他們把他的青蛙帶回家.

S.FORM: takem lasia hini' 'aehoe' ma siyae' atomal.
S.PHON: takəm las~θia hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ma s~θijæʔ atomal.
S.FORM: takem lasia hini' 'aehoe' ma siyae' atomal.
S.PHON: takəm las~θia hiniʔ ʔæhœʔ ma s~θijæʔ atomal.
S.TRANSL: The dog was very happy too.

S.FORM: nisia maray bala' isaa 'am lobih ila.
S.PHON: nis~θia maraj βalaʔ is~θaa ʔam loβih ila.
S.FORM: nisia maray bala' isaa 'am lobih ila.
S.PHON: nis~θia maraj βalaʔ is~θaa ʔam loβih ila.
S.TRANSL: He went home through the river.

S.FORM: kita'en hini' takem ma' 'ima sater hilasia koSa.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ takəm maʔ ʔima s~θatər hilas~θia koʃa.
S.FORM: kita'en hini' takem ma' 'ima sater hilasia koSa.
S.PHON: kitaʔən hiniʔ takəm maʔ ʔima s~θatər hilas~θia koʃa.

S.FORM: e pil'awan e pil'awan lasia hini'.
S.PHON: ə pilʔawan ə pilʔawan las~θia hiniʔ.
S.FORM: e pil'awan e pil'awan lasia hini'.
S.PHON: ə pilʔawan ə pilʔawan las~θia hiniʔ.

S.FORM: maraS ila 'insiya'a takem lobih ila.
S.PHON: maraʃ ila ʔins~θijaʔa takəm loβih ila.
S.FORM: maraS ila 'insiya'a takem lobih ila.
S.PHON: maraʃ ila ʔins~θijaʔa takəm loβih ila.
